```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
library(DEoptim)
library(lmomco)
library(DEoptim)
library(tidyr)
```






```{r}
# =====================================================================
# 1. DEFINE PATHS & DIRECTORIES
# =====================================================================
gdrive_path   <- "G:/My Drive"
project_path  <- file.path(gdrive_path, "Academic_git/DownScaling")
data_dir_name <- "QC_d data - Germany" 

# Input and Output Directories
metadata_dir <- file.path(project_path, "Marginals", data_dir_name, "Metadata")
plots_dir    <- file.path(project_path, "Marginals", data_dir_name, "Plots")

# Create the Plots directory if it doesn't exist
dir.create(plots_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# =====================================================================
# 2. LOAD REGIONAL MASTER DATA
# =====================================================================
master_rds_path <- file.path(metadata_dir, paste0(data_dir_name, "_Master_List_Filtered.rds"))

cat("Loading Master Regional Data...\n")
master_regional_data <- readRDS(master_rds_path)
```



```{r}

# Filter the data once for the station
stn_data <- master_regional_data$Final_Summary %>% 
  filter(Station_ID == "DE_00020")

# Extract the needed vectors
k_seq  <- stn_data$k_hours
p_zero <- stn_data$p_zero

t2_pos <- stn_data$t2_pos
t3_pos <- stn_data$t3_pos
t4_pos <- stn_data$t4_pos

t2_all <- stn_data$t2_all
t3_all <- stn_data$t3_all
t4_all <- stn_data$t4_all


# Function for L-variation (tau_2) of the whole process
calc_t2_all <- function(p0, t2_pos) {
  p1 <- 1 - p0
  
  t2_all <- p0 + p1 * t2_pos
  return(t2_all)
}

# Function for L-skewness (tau_3) of the whole process
calc_t3_all <- function(p0, t2_pos, t3_pos) {
  p1 <- 1 - p0
  
  num <- t2_pos * (p1^2) * t3_pos + 3 * p0 * p1 * t2_pos + 2 * (p0^2) - p0
  den <- p1 * t2_pos + p0
  
  t3_all <- num / den
  return(t3_all)
}

# Function for L-kurtosis (tau_4) of the whole process
calc_t4_all <- function(p0, t2_pos, t3_pos, t4_pos) {
  p1 <- 1 - p0
  
  num <- (p1^3) * t2_pos * t4_pos +
         5 * p0 * (p1^2) * t2_pos * t3_pos +
         3 * p0 * p1 * (3 * p0 - 1) * t2_pos +
         p0 * (5 * (p0^2) - 5 * p0 + 1)
  
  den <- p1 * t2_pos + p0
  
  t4_all <- num / den
  return(t4_all)
}
```


```{r}
# Calculate theoretical values using your empirical positive-only stats
t2_calc <- calc_t2_all(p0 = p_zero, t2_pos = t2_pos)
t3_calc <- calc_t3_all(p0 = p_zero, t2_pos = t2_pos, t3_pos = t3_pos)
t4_calc <- calc_t4_all(p0 = p_zero, t2_pos = t2_pos, t3_pos = t3_pos, t4_pos = t4_pos)

# Combine into a validation dataframe to inspect the differences
validation_df <- data.frame(
  k_hours = k_seq,
  p_zero  = p_zero,
  
  # L-variation Validation
  t2_obs  = t2_all,
  t2_calc = t2_calc,
  t2_diff = t2_all - t2_calc,
  
  # L-skewness Validation
  t3_obs  = t3_all,
  t3_calc = t3_calc,
  t3_diff = t3_all - t3_calc
)

# If you have t4_all in your empirical data, you can add it to the dataframe:
validation_df$t4_obs  <- t4_all
validation_df$t4_calc <- t4_calc
validation_df$t4_diff <- t4_all - t4_calc


```
